series_metadata.series_description: Computer printout in two parts listing all employees by agency, employee name, social security number and other pertinent payroll information. White copy is corrected and returned to DAS/Payroll Systems. Yellow copy is retained in agency. Payroll lette

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain three years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Wastepaper
